# Business Builders

> Business Builders is a full-service digital agency founded in 1999, headquartered in St. Augustine, Florida. We help businesses clarify their message, build their online presence, and grow through proven marketing strategies. We are a StoryBrand Certified Agency, HubSpot Platinum Partner, and 2x Inc. 5000 honoree. We have served over 1,000 clients across 26+ years.

## What We Do

Business Builders operates on a four-phase framework: Plan, Produce, Promote, and Protect.

- **Plan**: StoryBrand messaging workshops, marketing strategy consulting, AI strategy blueprints, and video/website blueprints
- **Produce**: Website design and development, branding and logos, video production, app development, and custom AI tool development
- **Promote**: Full-service marketing, SEO, social media marketing, HubSpot CRM setup and automation, and paid advertising
- **Protect**: Managed hosting with 99.9% uptime, WordPress maintenance and security, and ADA compliance

## Who We Serve

We work with small to mid-size businesses across these industries: automotive, healthcare, dental, construction, manufacturing, education, accounting, consumer goods, and churches and ministries. We serve clients locally in Northeast Florida (Jacksonville, St. Augustine, Palm Coast, Ponte Vedra, Daytona Beach, Gainesville) and nationally.

## What Makes Us Different

- **StoryBrand Certified**: We use the StoryBrand framework to clarify your message so customers engage. Clients typically see 30-50% improvements in conversion rates.
- **HubSpot Platinum Partner**: We implement and optimize HubSpot CRM for marketing automation, lead tracking, and sales enablement.
- **AI-Forward Agency**: We offer AI strategy blueprints and custom AI development — building tools, workflows, and automations that give businesses a competitive edge.
- **26+ Years of Results**: Founded in 1999, we are not a startup. We have the experience, processes, and portfolio to prove we deliver.

## Pricing

- StoryBrand Blueprint packages start at $1,950
- StoryBrand messaging: $3,500-$7,500
- Website design: $8,000-$15,000
- Ongoing marketing retainers: $2,500-$5,000/month

## How to Get Started

The fastest way to start is a free 15-minute discovery call or a free marketing audit.

## Services

- [Website Design](https://businessbldrs.com/website-design): Custom WordPress and web application design and development
- [StoryBrand Agency](https://businessbldrs.com/storybrand-agency): StoryBrand Certified messaging, BrandScripts, and marketing strategy
- [StoryBrand Messaging](https://businessbldrs.com/storybrand-messaging): Clarify your message using the StoryBrand framework
- [Marketing Services](https://businessbldrs.com/marketing-services): Full-service digital marketing strategy and execution
- [SEO Services](https://businessbldrs.com/seo-services): Search engine optimization and content strategy
- [Social Media Marketing](https://businessbldrs.com/social-media-marketing): Social media strategy, content creation, and management
- [HubSpot Implementation](https://businessbldrs.com/hubspot-implementation): HubSpot CRM setup, onboarding, and optimization
- [Video Production](https://businessbldrs.com/video-production): Professional video production for marketing and brand storytelling
- [Branding and Logos](https://businessbldrs.com/branding-logos): Brand identity design, logo creation, and brand guidelines
- [App Development](https://businessbldrs.com/app-development): Custom web and mobile application development
- [AI Blueprint](https://businessbldrs.com/ai-blueprint): AI strategy and workflow planning for businesses
- [AI Development](https://businessbldrs.com/ai-development): Custom AI tools, agents, and automation development
- [Marketing Strategy Consulting](https://businessbldrs.com/marketing-strategy-consulting): Strategic marketing planning and advisory
- [Ministry Blueprint](https://businessbldrs.com/ministry-blueprint): Digital strategy specifically for churches and ministries

- [Free SEO Audit](https://businessbldrs.com/free-seo-audit): Get a comprehensive SEO audit of your website at no cost
- [Marketing Plan Builder](https://businessbldrs.com/marketing-plan-builder): Build a custom marketing plan for your business
- [Cost Calculator](https://businessbldrs.com/cost-calculator): Estimate the cost of your website or marketing project
- [Marketing Audit](https://businessbldrs.com/marketing-audit): Free assessment of your current marketing efforts
